common.disclaimer: Seou-up Microblading is an information and visualization support platform only. Not a licensed medical or procedure provider.

landing.hero_badge: B2B SaaS Platform for Beauty Clinics
landing.hero_subtitle: AI brow simulation + client CRM + booking management. Everything your clinic needs in one place.
landing.trust_label: Trusted by studios in Korea · Thailand · Vietnam · Malaysia
landing.feature1_desc: Show clients exactly how their brows will look. 12 professional styles, instant visualization.
landing.feature2_desc: Track every client's consultation history, preferred styles, and session notes in one place.
landing.feature3_desc: Get discovered. List your clinic, earn a Featured badge, and appear at the top of search.
landing.dashboard_subtitle: A complete overview of your clinic — clients, sessions, and revenue at a glance.
landing.hiw_step1_desc: Create a Pro account and set up your studio profile in minutes.
landing.hiw_step2_desc: Use the AI simulator during client consultations to visualize results.
landing.hiw_step3_desc: Track clients, manage sessions, and get discovered by new customers.
landing.sim_desc: Our AI Brow Simulator lets clients see exactly how their brows will look across 12 professional styles — Natural Feather, Soft Arch, Ombre Gradient, and more. Increase client confidence and reduce hesitation.
landing.sim_bullet3: Share results via link or PDF
landing.pricing_subtitle: Start free, scale as you grow
landing.testimonial1_quote: The simulator saves 20 minutes per consultation. Clients love seeing their results before committing.
landing.testimonial2_quote: Getting featured doubled our online inquiries within the first month.
landing.testimonial3_quote: Finally a platform built for microblading studios, not generic salons.
landing.final_cta_subtitle: No credit card required. Full access for 14 days.
landing.footer_disclaimer: Visualization & information platform only. Not a licensed medical or procedure provider. Always consult a certified professional before any cosmetic procedure.
landing.hero_subtitle_old: Preview your perfect brows before any procedure.
landing.disclaimer: For visualization and information purposes only. Not a licensed medical or procedure provider.

simulate.title: Brow Simulator
simulate.subtitle: Choose a style, upload your photo, and preview your new brows.
simulate.disclaimer: Visualization Only — Results are not a guarantee of actual procedure outcomes.
simulate.subtitle_full: Preview 12 styles on your own photo — free & instant
simulate.viz_only_full: Results are for illustration only. Not a guarantee of procedure outcomes. Always consult a licensed professional.
simulate.consent_label: I agree that this image will be processed by AI and used for simulation only.
simulate.mock_note: Mock simulation · Visualization only · Not a procedure guarantee
simulate.sim_linked: Simulation has been linked to the client record.
simulate.notes_placeholder: Consultation notes, client preferences, skin condition...
simulate.failed_to_save: Failed to save. Please sign in and try again.
simulate.tip1: Use a front-facing photo with good lighting for best results
simulate.tip2: Portrait orientation (9:16) works best for accurate simulation
simulate.tip3: Your photos are private and automatically deleted after 30 days

pro_dashboard.title: Clinic Dashboard
pro_dashboard.subtitle: Manage consultations, track clients, and monitor your growth.
pro_dashboard.disclaimer_body: Sessions are for consultation visualization. Always hold valid local licenses before performing procedures.
pro_dashboard.no_clients_sub: Start a session to automatically create client records.
pro_dashboard.clients_footer: Client records are derived from session data. Full CRM available on Agency plan.
pro_dashboard.upgrade_body: Get unlimited consultations, full CRM, analytics & Featured badge on Agency plan.
